name: New Traditional Ceramic Bath Tray - Threshold™
description:
Add a statement look and easy organization to your bathroom with the New Traditional Ceramic Bath Tray from Threshold™. This cream bath tray features scalloped edges for a stylish look. Made with ceramic, this oval bath tray provides a perfect spot to organize your brushes, soaps and other bath essentials.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
